sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32943" key="e)ktalanto/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκτᾰλαντόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n32943.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be stripped of money,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐκταλαντωθείς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
